title: Component Documentation Schema
description: Schema for defining the documentation structure of a UI component, based on libs/types/src/context-doc.ts.

$schema.description: The schema reference for this file.

title.description: The main title of the component documentation (e.g., 'Button'). Corresponds to ContextDoc.title.

description.description: A detailed description of the component, its purpose, and key features. Corresponds to ContextDoc.description.

imports.description: An array of import statements required to use the component. Corresponds to ContextDoc.imports.

extraLinks.description: An array of external links related to the component. Corresponds to ContextDoc.extraLinks.

hints.description: An array of informational hints or alerts. Corresponds to ContextDoc.hints.

sections.description: An array of content sections for the component documentation. Corresponds to ContextDoc.sections.

types.description: An array defining the TypeScript types, props, events, and methods associated with the component. Corresponds to ContextDoc.types (optional array of DocApi).

tokens.description: An array of CSS custom properties (tokens) used by the component. Corresponds to ContextDoc.tokens (optional array of DocToken).

docExtraLinkItem.description: Defines an external link item. Corresponds to DocExtraLink interface.

docHintItem.description: Defines an informational hint or alert item. Corresponds to an item in ContextDoc.hints.

docCodeFileItem.description: Defines the data structure for 'code' type content when data is DocCodeFile.

docSectionContentItem.description: Defines the content of a documentation section. Corresponds to DocSection.content.

data.description: Data for the content. If type='code', this is DocCodeFile or DocCodeFile[]. If type='api', this is a string.

docSectionItem.description: Defines a documentation section. Corresponds to DocSection interface.

height.description: The height of the section in pixels.

date.description: Optional dates to indicate the status of the menu item.

createdAt.description: The creation date of the menu item.

updatedAt.description: The last update date of the menu item.

betaAt.description: The date the menu item was marked as beta.

deprecatedAt.description: The date the menu item was deprecated.

docTypeItem.description: Defines an individual segment of a type declaration. Corresponds to DocType interface.

name.description: The textual representation of this type segment.

link.description: An optional URL to the detailed documentation of this type segment.

docPropertyItem.description: Defines a property, event, or method item. Corresponds to DocProperty interface.

type.description: An array of type segments. This property itself is optional.

description.description: A description of what the item does.

default.description: The default value (for props) or general information (for events/methods). This property is optional.

syntaxHighlighterItem.description: Defines a syntax highlighter item for methods. Corresponds to SyntaxHighlighterItem interface.

content.description: The content of the method with JSDoc comments and signature.

docApiItem.description: Defines a TypeScript API block (interface, class, etc.). Corresponds to DocApi interface.

title.description: The name of the type or interface (e.g., 'Button', 'ButtonProps').

methods.description: An array of methods as SyntaxHighlighterItem[]. Optional.

docTokenItem.description: Defines a CSS custom property (token). Corresponds to DocToken interface.

description.description: A description of the token's purpose.

tokenLink.description: A link to more detailed documentation for the token. This property is optional.
